title: GenAI Gateway: LLM Sensitive-Information Disclosure (AML.T0057)
description: Detects attempts to coerce the LLM into disclosing system prompts, secrets, or sensitive context at the GenAI gateway. Fires when the guardrail flags sensitive disclosure or the data-leak flag is set (often paired with a REDACT verdict), ranking caller identity, API key, and source IP. MITRE ATLAS AML.T0057 (LLM Data Leakage / sensitive information disclosure).
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC GenAI Gateway Logs' and ('Guardrail Category' = 'sensitive_disclosure' or 'Data Leak Detected' = 'true') | stats count as Hits, distinctcount('GenAI Model') as Models, max('Prompt Risk Score') as MaxRisk by 'GenAI Identity', 'API Key ID', 'Client IP' | sort -Hits
falsepositives: Support flows legitimately repeating earlier content
